title: catha flexuosa
intro: Catha flexuosa, also known as khat, is a flowering plant native to the Horn of Africa and the Arabian Peninsula. The plant contains cathinone, a stimulant alkaloid with medicinal properties, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Catha flexuosa include improved mental alertness, reduced fatigue, and enhanced appetite, although its long-term use can lead to negative effects such as insomnia and increased heart rate. In traditional herbal medicine, Catha flexuosa is prepared as a tea or chewed fresh to release its active compounds, but modern preparations often involve extracting the cathinone through solvent-based methods.
